parents.subject: LU-10401 tests: add -F so list_param prints entry type

commit.subject: LU-11872 utils: add option to recreate symlink files
commit.message:
LU-11872 utils: add option to recreate symlink files

Since we don't support set project of symlink file directly.
But we could walkaround this problem by recreating symlink
files which will automatically inherit project attributes from
parents, this will work for directory quota.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Change-Id: I06561783f2d30b5fe682ece199a86ff78bc8de2a
Signed-off-by: Wang Shilong <wshilong@ddn.com>
